name: the write-time enforcer without a profile enforces every rule at its native severity (the config plane is purely additive)
command:
printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > pod.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file pod.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' e.txt && ! grep -q 'profile=' e.txt && echo native-baseline-unchanged 1>&2
